---
title: "PhD Students"
format: html
---

<link href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/aos@2.3.4/dist/aos.css" rel="stylesheet">
<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/aos@2.3.4/dist/aos.js"></script>
<script>AOS.init({ once: true, duration: 600 });</script>

```{=html}
<div class="phd-grid">

  <div class="phd-card" data-aos="fade-up" data-aos-delay="0">
    <div class="phd-name">Seungyeon Lee</div>
    <div class="phd-uni">University of Aberdeen</div>
    <div class="phd-dates">2024 – Present</div>
    <div class="phd-topic">Integrated population models of tawny owls.</div>
  </div>

  <div class="phd-card" data-aos="fade-up" data-aos-delay="100">
    <div class="phd-name">James Owen</div>
    <div class="phd-uni">Queen's University Belfast</div>
    <div class="phd-dates">2025 – Present</div>
    <div class="phd-topic">Geoprofiling methodology development.</div>
  </div>

  <div class="phd-card" data-aos="fade-up" data-aos-delay="200">
    <div class="phd-name">Sam Durston</div>
    <div class="phd-uni">University of St Andrews</div>
    <div class="phd-dates">2026 – Present</div>
    <div class="phd-topic">Refining spatial methodology for marine environments.</div>
  </div>

</div>
```

[$\leftarrow$ Back to CV Overview](cv.qmd)
